# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

# =============================================================================
# Kong Declarative Configuration for API Management Platform
# =============================================================================

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Upstreams - Define backend service clusters with load balancing
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
upstreams:
  # User Service Upstream
  - name: user-service-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    hash_on_cookie_path: "/"
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 302
          interval: 5
          successes: 3
        http_path: /health
        https_verify_certificate: false
        timeout: 5
        type: http
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 503
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 201
            - 202
            - 204
          successes: 5
        type: http
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
          tcp_failures: 5
          timeouts: 5
    targets:
      - target: user-service-1.internal:8001
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - user-service
          - primary
      - target: user-service-2.internal:8001
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - user-service
          - secondary
      - target: user-service-3.internal:8001
        weight: 50
        tags:
          - user-service
          - tertiary

  # Order Service Upstream
  - name: order-service-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    hash_on: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
          interval: 10
          successes: 3
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        type: http
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 503
          interval: 10
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 201
            - 204
          successes: 5
        type: http
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
          tcp_failures: 5
          timeouts: 5
    targets:
      - target: order-service-1.internal:8002
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - order-service
          - primary
      - target: order-service-2.internal:8002
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - order-service
          - secondary

  # Product Service Upstream
  - name: product-service-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        concurrency: 5
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        type: http
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 503
          interval: 10
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: product-service-1.internal:8003
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - product-service
          - primary
      - target: product-service-2.internal:8003
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - product-service
          - secondary
      - target: product-service-3.internal:8003
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - product-service
          - tertiary

  # Payment Service Upstream
  - name: payment-service-upstream
    algorithm: consistent-hashing
    hash_on: header
    hash_on_header: X-Customer-ID
    hash_fallback: consumer
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        concurrency: 5
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
          interval: 5
          successes: 3
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 3
        type: http
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
    targets:
      - target: payment-service-1.internal:8004
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - payment-service
          - primary
      - target: payment-service-2.internal:8004
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - payment-service
          - secondary

  # Notification Service Upstream
  - name: notification-service-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
          interval: 15
          successes: 2
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        type: http
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 503
          interval: 15
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: notification-service-1.internal:8005
        weight: 100
      - target: notification-service-2.internal:8005
        weight: 100

  # Analytics Service Upstream
  - name: analytics-service-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
          interval: 30
          successes: 2
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 10
        type: http
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 503
          interval: 30
    targets:
      - target: analytics-service-1.internal:8006
        weight: 100
      - target: analytics-service-2.internal:8006
        weight: 100

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Consumers - API consumers with credentials
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
consumers:
  - username: web-application
    custom_id: web-app-001
    tags:
      - web
      - frontend
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: web-app-api-key-2024-secure
        tags:
          - web-app-key
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          hour: 10000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

  - username: mobile-application
    custom_id: mobile-app-001
    tags:
      - mobile
      - frontend
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: mobile-app-api-key-2024-secure
        tags:
          - mobile-app-key
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 5000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

  - username: partner-integration
    custom_id: partner-001
    tags:
      - partner
      - external
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: partner-api-key-2024-secure
        tags:
          - partner-key
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          hour: 2000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

  - username: internal-service
    custom_id: internal-svc-001
    tags:
      - internal
      - service-to-service
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: internal-svc-api-key-2024-secure
        tags:
          - internal-key
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 5000
          hour: 100000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Services - Backend microservice definitions
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
services:
  # =========================================================================
  # User Service
  # =========================================================================
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service-upstream:8001
    protocol: http
    host: user-service-upstream
    port: 8001
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    tags:
      - user-service
      - core
    routes:
      # User CRUD operations
      - name: user-crud-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 0
        tags:
          - user-routes
          - crud

      # User authentication endpoints
      - name: user-auth-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/auth
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - user-routes
          - authentication

      # User profile endpoints
      - name: user-profile-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/profiles
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
          - PATCH
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - user-routes
          - profiles

    plugins:
      # Key Authentication for User Service
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
            - X-API-Key
          key_in_query: true
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_body: false
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: true

      # Rate Limiting for User Service
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 50
          minute: 1000
          hour: 20000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          error_code: 429
          error_message: "Rate limit exceeded for user service"

      # Request Transformer
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Service-Name:user-service"
              - "X-Gateway-Version:1.0"
          append:
            headers:
              - "X-Request-Start:$(now)"

      # CORS Plugin
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app.example.com"
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - X-API-Key
            - X-Request-ID
          exposed_headers:
            - X-RateLimit-Limit
            - X-RateLimit-Remaining
            - X-RateLimit-Reset
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

  # =========================================================================
  # Order Service
  # =========================================================================
  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service-upstream:8002
    protocol: http
    host: order-service-upstream
    port: 8002
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 120000
    read_timeout: 120000
    tags:
      - order-service
      - core
    routes:
      # Order management
      - name: order-management-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - order-routes
          - management

      # Order status and tracking
      - name: order-tracking-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders/tracking
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 10
        tags:
          - order-routes
          - tracking

      # Order history and reports
      - name: order-history-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders/history
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 10
        tags:
          - order-routes
          - history

    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
            - X-API-Key
          key_in_query: true
          key_in_header: true
          hide_credentials: true

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 30
          minute: 500
          hour: 10000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          error_code: 429
          error_message: "Rate limit exceeded for order service"

      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 10
          size_unit: megabytes
          require_content_length: false

      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Service-Name:order-service"
              - "X-Gateway-Version:1.0"

      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app.example.com"
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - X-API-Key
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600

  # =========================================================================
  # Product Service
  # =========================================================================
  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service-upstream:8003
    protocol: http
    host: product-service-upstream
    port: 8003
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    tags:
      - product-service
      - core
    routes:
      # Product catalog
      - name: product-catalog-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - product-routes
          - catalog

      # Product categories
      - name: product-categories-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/categories
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - product-routes
          - categories

      # Product search
      - name: product-search-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products/search
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 10
        tags:
          - product-routes
          - search

      # Product inventory
      - name: product-inventory-route
        paths:
